snippet.title: Pani Padhero 2 | Kurai Bujhdaina | Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan | New Nepali Song 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Pani Padhero ( Kurai Bujhdaina) by Bhim Bista & Eleena Chauhan only on Eenakshi Entertainment's official YouTube channel.

Eenakshi Entertainment Presents:- New Nepali Song 2021

|| Pani Padhero 2 Kurai Bujhdaina कुरै बुझ्दैन (पानी पँधेरो-2) || 

#BhimBista #EleenaChauhan #EenakshiEntertainment #NewNepaliSong
------------------------------------------

♪ Singer:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

♪ Music:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Lyrics:-
Bhim Bista

♪ Arrange:-
Jeevan Badu

♪ Mix/Master:-
Shyamshwet Rasaily

♪ Studio:- 
Big Parivesh

♪ Flute:- 
Ratna Flute

♪ Guitar/Mendolin:- 
Sanjib Baraily

------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:-

🎬 Artists:-
Bhim Bista
Eleena Chauhan

🎬 Cameraman:- 
Prakash Khadka

🎬 MUA:- 
Mahi Singh

🎬 Edit/Color:-
Dinson Shah

🎬 Technical Adviser:-
Rajendra Aryal

🎬 Publicity Designer:- 
Dinson Shah

कुरै बुझ्दैन Lyrics:- 
तिम्रे फुटो छातिमा टाँस्या छु
तिमी साथमा छौ र पो हाँस्या छु
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-1
एउटा कुरा भन्छु ल आज म
तिमी नै छौ मुटुको माझमा
कुरै बुझ्दैन
निद्रा पनि लाग्दैन खाना पनि रुच्दैन
मायालुले कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-2
लाली गुराँस फुल फुल्यो बनैमा
तिमी फुल्यौ फक्रक्कै मनैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

G-2
मुना मदन पढेको कथामा
तिमी र म जिबनभर साथमा कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-3
तिम्लाई सम्झि टोलाउँछु छिनछिनै
झनझन माया बड्दै छ दिनदिनै कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

G-3
जोडी ढुकुर जैले नि साथैमा
तिम्रै नाऊँको मेहेन्दी हातैमा कुरै बुझ्दैन
बोल्दा पनि बोल्दैन हेर्दा पनि हेर्दैन
मायालुले माया गर्दैन

B-4
मनको कुरो मनैमा सिमित
कैले हामी हुने खै तिमी म कुरेै बुझ्दैन

G-4
घामले पोल्छ शितलु छायाँ छ
मुटुभरि  उसैको माया छ कुरै बुझ्दैन

B-5
भन्न खोज्छु भन्नलाइ डराऊँछु
कति धेरै उस्लाई मन पराऊँछु कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि...

G-5
आखै फुटोस संसारेै हेर्दिन
तिम्ले छोडे सास नै फेर्दिन कुरै बुझ्दैन
निन्द्रा पनि....

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-686 || Jan-19-2021 || Media Hub|| Nepali Comedy
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Production: Media Hub Pvt. Ltd.
Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd. 
Production Advisor: Som Dhital
Direction: Daman Rupakheti 
Editor: Rabin Bhatta
Sub-Editor: Ashok Chaudhary
Graphics: Rajendra Manandhar
Script Writer: Kunjan Bhattarai
Camera: Rahul Rai
Makeup: Nirmala Acharya

snippet.description:
सुमधुर स्वरका धनी बाल दोहोरी गायक प्रिन्स लम्साल र सुमधुर स्वरकी धनी लोकदोहोरी गायिका आशा बि.सी.  बिचको निकै रमाईलो दोहोरी "डोको बुनेर" प्रस्तुत गरेका छौँ  लाईक कमेन्ट सेयर गरिदिनुहोला धन्यवाद ।

snippet.title: EMIWAY - WHAT CAN I DO (PROD. BY FLAMBOY) (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Lyrics given below 

Artist /lyrics : Emiway Bantai 
Prod/ music : Flamboy 
Mix &master : Emiway Bantai
Director / dop : Canfuse
Associate director : Sankalp Vaid 
EDIT : Riddhi Hadkar
COLOURIST : Canfuse
Production- Bantai Studio 
Production management- Minta ,Sumit singh
Line production- Sankalp Vaid 
Production Asst. - Akash Gurram, Mohan Shetty 
Makeup- Shyam Shrilal Vishwakarma 
BTS  : Akash Singh,  Shubham Bandhal, & Sumit Fanse

Streaming on All Audio Platforms :

Apple Music – https://music.apple.com/in/album/what-can-i-do-single/1550885290 
Spotify – https://open.spotify.com/track/3iAe6EeL2sDubF42mCadsF 
Amazon Music – https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08V59VMR9?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08V4B4T32 
YouTube Music – https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=XG73UQhA9RQ&feature=share 
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSEBBb4B/ 
Hungama – https://www.hungama.com/song/what-can-i-do/61789691/ 
JioSaavn – https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/what-can-i-do/L14nHBJUbR4 
Wynk – https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana – https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo 🔥
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai

snippet.title: कलाैटे र मुसि सारङ्गि संसारमा आउँदा उधुमै रमाईलो साथमा रियाकाे दाेहाेरि Kalaute, Musi, Riya Ep. 191
snippet.description:
नमस्कार ,
सारङ्गि संसारमा आजको कार्यक्रम सधै भन्दा अलि फरक अनि अझै रमाईलाे प्रस्तुतिका साथ हामी उपस्थित भयका छाै । यहाँहरुले हामिलाई दिनुभयकाे माया र हाैसलाले हामी फुरुङ्ग हुँदै हाम्रा देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने दर्शक महानुभावहरुकाे मनाेरज्जनका लागि निरन्तर नेपाली माैलिक लाेकदाेहाेरि कार्यक्रम सारङ्गि संसार राेधि घर सन्चालन गर्दै आईरहेका छौँ  । 

आजको प्रस्तुतिमा  हामिले  जीवन भर भाेकाे पेटले सारङ्गि रेटिरहने, अाफु राेयर अरुलाई हसाउदै अनि नचाउदै अाउनुभयका , नेपालकाे माैलिक लाेक बाजा सारङ्गिलाई आफुलाई भन्दा बढि माया गरेर गाउँ गाउँ बस्ति बस्ति पुग्दै मनाेरज्जन दिदै आउनुभयका कलाकार कलाैटे गन्धर्व र मुसि गन्धर्बकाे साथमा छाेरा मिलन गन्धर्व , विराज गन्धर्व सँगै पछिल्लाे समयकि भाईरल लाेकप्रिय  कलाकार रिया खड्का काे साथै सम्पुर्ण सारङ्गि संसार परिवार र हामिलाई सपाेर्ट गर्दै अाउनुभयका मिडियाकर्मि साथिहरुबिच काे जमघट सँगै रमाईलाे कार्यक्रम प्रस्तुत गरेका छाै ।  
 मुसि र कलाैटे , फ्याम्लि फ्याम्लाे काे आगमनले सारङ्गि संसारकाे गरिमा र हाम्राे लक्ष काे उजागार भयकाे छ। गाउघर समाज हुँदै उहाँहरु सारङ्गि संसारकाे मञ्च सम्म सारङ्गि बाेकेरै आउदा हामी अत्यन्तै खुसि र उहाहरुप्रति अाभारि पनि छाै । यहाँ सम्म ल्याईदिनुहुने ए वन टेलिभिजनका सन्चारकर्मि ,कलाकार अमृतमान वलि सर प्रति पनि हामी अाभारि छाै ।कलाैटे बुवा र मुसि अामाकाे परिवारबाट  हामिले जति मनाेरन्जन  लिईरहेका छाै सायद याे रमाईलाे काे मूल्य हामी कहिल्यै तिरेर सक्ने छैनाै । र आज उहाँहरुकाे बास्तबिकतालाई बुझ्दै जाँदा निकै दुख लाग्याे । देश तथा बिदेशमा रहनुहुने भगवानरुपि दर्शक महानुभावहरुले पनप उहाँहरुकाे दुखलाई सहशुस गर्नुहुनेछ र उहाँहरुकाे उचित व्यबस्थापनकाे लागि धेरै थाेरै सहयाेग गर्नुहुनेछ भन्दा अासा पनि लियका छाै । यहाँहरुले पठाउने सहयाेगलाई हामिले अर्काे कार्यक्रममा उहाँहरुकै हातमा जस्ताकाे तस्तै हस्तान्तरण गर्ने छाै ।
सहयाेगका  लागि 
कमल कुमार बि. क. Kamal Kumar BK  9841889961 
ताराकान्त बि. क. Tarakanta BK  9847629512  
याे नम्बरमा सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नहुनेछ । यदि याे भिडियाे मन पर्याे भने एक एक सेयर गरेर संसारभर पुर्याईदिन सहयाेग गर्नुहाेला धन्याबाद ।

snippet.title: Din Gin Gin 'दिन गिन गिन' New Song 2021 by Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi || Paul Shah & Garima Sharma
snippet.description:
"Din Gin Gin" A typical Nepali Cultural Tharu song. This song tries to show Tharu art and culture .The singers of this song Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi are very knowledgeable about Tharu art and culture. Featuring With Paul Shah well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film industry and Garima Sharma also a very talented rising Nepali actress in the Nepalese Music industry. This song have been filmed in various beautiful places of the Tarai in Tharu Communities. The song is directed by Bikram Chauhan & Cinematographed by Arjun Tiwari.

snippet.title: Gharko jhyalaima | Chatra Shahi, Menuka Pariyar, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata | New Dohori Song 2021
snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment presents a typical and cultural new lok dohori song "gharko Jhyalaima" 2077/2021. The singers of this song Chhatra Shahi, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata are from one of the popular live dohori show "Indreni". Indreni is a popular Television and Youtube Program in Nepal which has been broadcasting from Television and Indreni Official Youtube Since 6 years. 
Menuka Pariyar is also a very skilled and talented singer. Most of the songs she sang by are also very popular and most viewed in nepal.
Featuring artists on this song are Jibesh Singh Gurung, Lomash Sharma, Alina Rayamajhi, Samiksha Pokhrel & Punya Gautam. Jibesh Singh Gurung is a popular and talented actor, director, and writer at Colleges Nepal comedy series. Alina Rayamajhi & Samiksha Pokhrel are rising and talented actresses in Nepalese film & music Industry. And Lomash Sharma, a handsome, talented and most skilled rising star in nepali folk music industry.
Special Appearance Punya Gautam, who has been active in politics since childhood, aims to serve the country and the people selflessly by engaging in politics all of his life.

►©►S3K Entertainment Pvt. Ltd 2021. All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar, Aayusha Gautam || मेरी बास्सै || Ep-687 || Jan-26-2021 || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

Digital Partner: Branding Bee Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: मुसलमान गायक अलिफ खान र शिशिर भण्डारीको भेट । 'फोटो फिरिममा' सुनाए, सडकमा सुतेको सम्झेर रोएAlif Khan
snippet.description:
सडकपेटीमा सतेको सम्झदा मुस्लिम गायक अलिफ खान भावुक भए । दुखमा रोए, फोटो फिरिममा सुनाए ।
Host- Shishir Bhandari
Guest- Alif Khan

snippet.title: सीधा कुरा जनतासंग: Rabi Lamichhane replaced by Samjhana Bhujel at News 24 TV, Prem Baniya responds
snippet.description:
It was Rabi Lamichhane's idea and effort to start Sidha Kura Pradhanmantri sanga during the first prime minister-ship of KP Oli. When Prachanda became prime minister, somebody else stated to run the program. Rabi started another program by the name Sidha Kura Janatasanga. Now, News 24 is claiming the title. Rabi has a tough choice to name his new program in another brand-new TV channel. 
#CelebrityOfNepal #AnandNepal

snippet.title: Nepal में Pushpa Kamal Dahal की रैली में आए मधेसी India के समर्थन में क्या बोले? (BBC Hindi)
snippet.description:
नेपाल के पूर्व प्रधानमंत्री पुष्प कमल दहल प्रचंड ने राजधानी काठमांडू में एक रैली करके अपनी ताक़त दिखाई है. नेपाल में सियासी संकट अभी जारी है. काठमांडू में बीबीसी संवाददाता रजनीश कुमार ने प्रचंड की रैली में आए कुछ लोगों से बात की. 

कैमरा: दीपेश शाही

#Nepal #Kathmandu #NepalPolitics

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 22 January 2021 at 9:00 PM

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 22 January 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: The Kapil Sharma Show Season 2 - The Big Bull Stars Are Here - Full Ep - 174 - 10th Jan, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SET India: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpEhnqL0y41EpW2TvWAHD7Q?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch the full episodes of The Kapil Sharma Show: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzufeTFnhupw4um68ni-2wyqenswK2ayG

Episode 174: The Big Bull Stars Are Here
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Here comes The Big Bulls Stars, Ajay Devang, Abhishek Bachchan, Sohum Shah, and Nikita Dutta are on the Set of The Kapil Sharma Show and have a huge laughter ride, sharing their experiences of working with each other. Catch the fun. 

About The Kapil Sharma Show Season 2 : 
----------------------------------------------------------------
Kapil Sharma is back with a new 'Salah Center' (Consultancy Business) in a Mohollah with absurd characters. The wealthy milkman Bachcha Yadav (Kiku Sharda) with his wife Titli Yadav (Bharti Singh) and sister-in-law Bhoori (Sumona Singh) is the one who has rented out houses within the Mohollah and is Kapil Sharma's business partner. The neighbors in the Mohollah are also full of quirks and don't shy away from the antics. With celebrities gracing every episode, The Kapil Sharma Show promises fun-filled entertaining weekends.

#thekapilsharmashow #comedy #thekapilsharmashowfullepisodes

snippet.description:
Credits:
Starring Gopichand, Zareen Khan & Mehreen Pirzada
Directed by Thiru
Produced by  Rama Brahmam Sunkara
Written by Ravi
Screenplay by Thiru
Story by Thiru
Music by Vishal Chandrasekhar, Sricharan Pakala
Background Score:  Sricharan Pakala
Cinematography by Vetri Palanisamy
Edited by Marthand K Venkatesh

Synopsis
Arjun (Gopichand), one of RAW’s best agents, who also leads a double life as Ramakrishna, who works as a bank employee. For years, RAW has been planning to capture Qureshi, who has been behind some of the biggest terror attacks in India. Despite knowing Qureshi is in Pakistan, RAW is helpless. In one of his missions, Arjun goes to Syria to nab a key member of Qureshi’s gang. It sets him off on a journey which brings him face to face with Qureshi’s son Sohail (Upen Patel). Watch the movie to find out whether Arjun would succeed in his mission or not.

snippet.title: 2021 BHAUKAL (2021) New Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 South Movies In Hindi | Latest Movie
snippet.description:
Businessman and gold smuggler George Peter and his driver are killed under mysterious circumstances. Police investigators Muhammed Easa and Isaac discover that it was carried out with a surgical blade, causing them to think a doctor was behind it. They start investigating medical shops. At the same time, Marco JR, George's brother, meets Davis and his sons – their rivals – to ask whether it was their work. Davis's son Abraham starts speaking in a condescending manner, enraging Marco and provoking him to shoot Abraham.During his funeral, Easa asks Davis if it was Marco. Davis does not tell him, thinking that he could seek revenge on his own.Some days after an unknown person shoots Patrick – the mid stander between the 2 gangs – Easa and Isaac take him to Star Hospital where he gets murdered despite being protected with maximum security. This solidifies Easa and Isaac's theory that the murderer is a doctor.

Meanwhile, someone interrogates a pharmacist to know the truth over the murders. Both the gangs start believing that someone is after them.Isaac becomes suspicious of Easa since he earlier said that he had an informant but didn't reveal anything about him. Isaac investigates on his own, discovering that Dr. Mikhael John, the casualty specialist of Star Hospital, is both the killer and the informant. He also understands that Easa is helping Mikhael since they had contacted each other several times. He tells Easa what he has learned in his investigation, forcing Easa to reveal everything in order to prevent the arrest of Dr. Mikhael. Easa explains that when Mikhael was 10 years old, he was involved in an accident that killed his father. Mikhael's mother blamed him for his father's death.

snippet.title: Mero Rato Galbandi New Song 2021 by Pratap Das & Sapana Ghimire | Smarika/Samarika/Bale/Balchhi/Raju
snippet.description:
"Halka Ramailo" one of the best & popular comedy series in Nepal proudly presents the new nepali song "mero rato galbandi kata harayo" by Pratap Das and Sapana Ghimire Poudel. Pratap Das is Nepali young and very talented rising singing star. He is famous for second runner-up of Nepal ideal season one. Singer Sapana Ghimire Poudel is also known as the wife of popular comedian artist Raju Master. 
Featuring characters on this music video are Sagar Lamsal (bale), Samarika Dhakal, & Smarika Dhakal. Sagar Lamsal is a very popular and talented Nepali Actor. he is also popularly known as “Bale Boro” which is his character name in the TV show named “Bhadragol" & "Sakkigoni". Samarika Dhakal & Smarika Dhakal are twins sister and very popular in tiktok. 
Co - appearence Raju Poudel and Marichman Shrestha are also very popular comedian artist of Nepal who are popularly known by their Character's name 'Raju Master' and 'Balchhi Dhurbe'. Both Raju Master and Balchi Dhurbe are comedain characters in a comedy tele serial 'Halka Ramailo' that broadcasts from Balchhi Dhurbe Youtube Channel every sunday.

Lyrics:
Kehi raat bitayera hera, ma bina anindra
bhaye ma birami, ma birami
kehi din ko kura tara

sabai sanchai huncha
mann turuntai ta kaha thik hunthyo ra
sabai bhuldai ma gadi ma timi bata taadina
hunthyo ra, ki hunthena sochdai

decisions of the heart never impress me
but i do it for some love
you gotta leave a little room for forgiveness
my fault, turn around

timi risaye hasauna ma
feri risaye fakauna ma
k garu bhana, k garu bhana
timi risaye hasauna ma

balla talla lagya maya bigaryo kasle
mero geet timro phone ma bajiracha aile ni nadhata maya preetai malai bhari garho basnai

adhi bottle bhyayera jhyap jhyap jhai

falidiye sabai nirasa maile
tyagum ra maya nai

snippet.description:

⦿ Sabse Bada Balwaan - https://youtu.be/Nqfg4CwDU_E

⦿ Nastik Returns - https://youtu.be/Sy0amxGhG5Y
⦿ Nastik Returns - https://youtu.be/XhkwQhsKrhk
⦿ Qahar The Terror - https://youtu.be/Oxi1ZXU4iec
⦿ Mission 420 - https://youtu.be/VnsD6DzW2vQ
⦿ Main Hoon Fighterbaaz - https://youtu.be/-iYJiV8pclE
⦿ Total Fukrey - https://youtu.be/mhu-XMmUhHs
⦿ Jaanbaaz Khiladi - https://youtu.be/_kPSCqPqXlA
⦿ Dumdaar Rebel - https://youtu.be/jP_jo21cvtY
⦿ Policewale Ki Jung - https://youtu.be/1h7PhSz89-M
⦿ Mere Apne Returns - https://youtu.be/-O0a1WBZINo
⦿ iUltimate - https://youtu.be/VjYNQ8dA38Y
⦿ South Family Entertainment Movie - https://youtu.be/JM3paEbVCZA

Movie Credits:
Directed by Thiru
Produced by Dhananjayan
Written by Thiru
Starring: Karthik, Gautham Karthik, Regina Cassandra, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Santhosh Prathap
Music by Sam CS
Cinematography: Richard M. Nathan
Edited by T. S. Suresh
Production company: Creative Entertainers

Synopsis:
The movie starts of with Azhagar, the CEO of a taxi business, receiving an award and GoCabs CEO Vinayak congratulating him. Then, it shows Chandramouli waiting in traffic with a green Premier Padmini. He arrives at his son Raghav's boxing match, and they argue about the car. Afterward, we learn about Madhu, Raghav's girlfriend, and a flashback reveals that they met after Chandramouli accidentally hit the back of Madhu's Vespa. Later on, there has been a series of crimes involving GoCab drivers, and Vinayak cannot sponsor Raghav for the state championships, so he decides to go to Azhagar for a sponsorship. He goes on to win the state championships, and the prize is a Suzuki Baleno. Chandramouli asks Raghav to go for a drive with him, to which he agrees. During the drive, their Padmini gets in an accident with a lorry, and Pugazhendhi, Azhagar's assistant, beats Chandramouli to death. Raghav later wakes up in a hospital, and learns that due to the accident, he can only see two feet in front of him, and also learns that his father is dead. A couple weeks later, Raghav receives a death certificate for a person called Bairavi. We later learn in a flashback that she and Chandramouli were close friends, and that she was killed by Pugazh and his men. The rest of the story is about how Raghav finds out why they killed Bairavi and Chandramouli.

Subscribe to South Stars For New South Indian Movies in Hindi for FREE - http://bit.ly/SouthFamilyEntertainment

Raghav later wakes up in a hospital, and learns that due to the accident, he can only see two feet in front of him, and also learns that his father is dead. A couple weeks later, Raghav receives a death certificate for a person called Bairavi. We later learn in a flashback that she and Chandramouli were close friends, and that she was killed by Pugazh and his men. The rest of the story is about how Raghav finds out why they killed Bairavi and Chandramouli.

snippet.title: Gale Lagana Hai - Tony Kakkar & Neha Kakkar | Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Gale Lagana Hai by @Tony Kakkar & @Neha Kakkar  ft. Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma 

Singer - Tony Kakkar & Neha Kakkar
Music - Tony Kakkar 
Lyrics - Tony Kakkar
Song Arranged & Programmed by Rakesh Chary & Tony Kakkar
Flute - Naveen
Guitars - Shomu Seal
Violin - Kailash Patra

Directors - Agam Mann & Azeem Mann

VFX - Inside Motion Pictures
AD - Ravi Goyal
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital

HUM BHEEGI BHEEGI RATON MEIN 
TERA INTEZAAR KARTE HAIN
KYA KAHOON TUMHE JAANA JAAN 
KITNA PYAAR KARTE HAIN
DUNIYA NE JO ZAKHM DIYE HAR ZAKHM DIKHANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
WAQT KA KYA PATA KAB JEENA KAB MAR JAANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 

MERE HAATHON MEIN TERA HAATH HO YAHI MANGOON RAB SE
ZAMANE KO MAIN BHI KAHOON TU MERA HAI HAQ SE
AAKHON SE SHURU JO MOHABAAT HAI USSE DIL TAK JAANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
MERE PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 

TUM TUM NAHI HUM HUM NAHI EK JAAN HAIN AB SE 
TADPE HAIN TARSE HAIN TANHA RAHE KABSE
KUCH HI DER KI HAI ZINDGI AUR PHIR MAR JAANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
GALE LAGANA HAI

snippet.title: चॉकलेट के शौक़ीन चुनौती! Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
लड़के की हम आज आप के लिए वास्तव में कुछ खास मिल गया है! एक चॉकलेट चुनौती-क्या बेहतर हो सकता है? हम आपको सामान से प्यार है और हमारे गिरोह एक ही राय की है कितना पता है! वापस बैठो और आराम करो और इस वीडियो को देखने से पहले एक और दूसरा इंतजार नहीं है!

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Lukaamaari [Official Lyrical Video]
snippet.description:
We identify love as a noun and we experience it as a verb. This song is one that speaks of love as an action rather than the decoration of an idea with words. When everything is a cliché and every metaphor is mundane, the only way to truly communicate love is through action. As words escape our sights and play hide and seek with us, we discover new ways to speak love. "Lukaamaari" is the story of such a discovery.
___________________________________________________________________________
As we embark on the new year 2021, we take with us our victory through perseverance and survival with grace. Thank you for being a part of our journey. Here is to another year of progress and prosperity.
___________________________________________________________________________

Official lyrical video for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Lukaamaari'.

Written | Performed | Produced by:
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

The Downtown Flux team for 'Lukaamaari':
Abhinav Bhatta
Kailash Subedi
Nurbu Lama
Sajjan Raj Vaidya
Saumya Karki
Sharif Shrestha

Visit our website: https://www.sajjanrajvaidya.com/

Subscribe to Sajjan's channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/sajjanrajvaidya/
Watch all of Sajjan's videos here: https://www.youtube.com/c/sajjanrajvaidya/videos
